prototypes.title: ProSocial — People Chat (Refined)
prototypes.description: Refined people-chat concept with pin-sharing affordances. Shown on a Figma-style pan/zoom design canvas.
prototypes.notes: Pan/zoom the canvas to explore multiple screens.

prototypes.title: Creator Dashboard — Team Chat
prototypes.description: Concept for in-app team chat inside the Creator dashboard. Warm palette, Georgia display type.
prototypes.notes: V1 — exported from a Claude artifact session.

prototypes.title: Social Banking — Chat Concepts
prototypes.description: Multiple chat concept variations for ProSocial. Exploration of layouts and interaction patterns.
prototypes.notes: Companion to the Creator chat concept — same week.
